nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I like to have conversations frequently where I state my objective or intended outcome and then have the AI ask me questions

nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I think there's hardly any downside on my end for using it in an administrative sense

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: cut my turnaround time on galleries from 12 weeks to about 3

nodes.label: AI as tool for market and business perspective
nodes.label_negative: AI causing loss of creative ownership
nodes.grounding_span: it will consider the impact to that 'bigger vision' more easily and consistently than I do

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as focused tool for selective ideas
nodes.grounding_span: it can give me a sense of shiny-object syndrome

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: keeping myself in creative control is essential with my work

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: the amount of time I spend on these tasks has been reduced

nodes.label: Business growth and profitability
nodes.grounding_span: I am able to charge more, so I know I've been making significantly more money

nodes.label: Intentional focus and long-term vision
nodes.grounding_span: I've had to become much more intentional about what I take on and how it will promote my long-term objectives

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I think it has improved my quality of output in every way and arena of business

nodes.label: Concern about creativity loss
nodes.grounding_span: I worry that relying on it too much in regards to creative steps will remove me from the drivers seat

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: I do worry that with mass acceptance there will be the risk that AI is used more - but not more intentionally

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth ideation with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I will first extensively train the AI on my tone of voice... then I provide the initial idea or the draft version and then use the AI to help me see my 'blind spots'

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — separates creative from non-creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I've had to become much more intentional about what I take on and how it will promote my long-term objectives
